texto: We are living in a culture where we are so led by the visual, and what is promoted in the media, that the attitude becomes, 'I don't have to go through normalcy in life - I can look for exemptions. And I expect them, and when I look for them and they are not there, I am angry.'
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ben Harney sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “We are living in a culture where we are so led by the visual, and what is promoted in the media, …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, culture, i-am, útil em momentos de culture e i-am.
